ayahArabic: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
ayahEnglish: What is the Inevitable Reality?

targetTranslation: he made you know (object of وَمَآ - 'and what')
ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
ayahEnglish: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?

ayahArabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
ayahEnglish: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
ayahEnglish: Thamūd and ʿAad denied the Striking Calamity [i.e., the Resurrection].

ayahArabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
ayahEnglish: Thamūd and ʿAad denied the Striking Calamity [i.e., the Resurrection].

targetTranslation: Thamud (subject of فَأُهْلِكُوا - so they were destroyed)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: So as for Thamūd, they were destroyed by the overpowering [blast].

targetTranslation: Ad (the ancient tribe that was destroyed)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: And as for ʿAad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind

targetTranslation: an intensely cold and howling (describing رِيحٍ - wind)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: And as for ʿAad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind

targetTranslation: furiously strong (describing رِيحٍ/wind, owned by something)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: And as for ʿAad, they were destroyed by a screaming, violent wind

targetTranslation: he forcefully controlled it (referring to the wind mentioned earlier)
ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
distractors: he could be granted a life

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

targetTranslation: palm trees (like trunks of palm trees)
ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

ayahArabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Which He [i.e., Allāh] imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

targetTranslation: you see (in response to فَهَلْ - 'then do?')
ayahArabic: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Then do you see of them any remains?

targetTranslation: any remaining/lasting thing (feminine, object of مِنْ)
ayahArabic: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: Then do you see of them any remains?

ayahArabic: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahEnglish: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.

targetTranslation: before him (referring to the people who came before Pharaoh)
ayahArabic: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
ayahEnglish: And there came Pharaoh and those before him and the overturned cities with sin.

ayahArabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahEnglish: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

ayahArabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahEnglish: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

targetTranslation: a single seizing (of them by Allah)
ayahArabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahEnglish: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

ayahArabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
ayahEnglish: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

targetTranslation: when (specifically referring to طَغَا - it overflowed)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried you [i.e., your ancestors] in the sailing ship

ayahArabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried you [i.e., your ancestors] in the sailing ship

targetTranslation: we carried you all (referring to humanity being carried in the ark)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried you [i.e., your ancestors] in the sailing ship

ayahArabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وٰعِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

ayahArabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وٰعِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

ayahArabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وٰعِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

targetTranslation: it was blown (into الصُّورِ - the Horn)
ayahArabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وٰحِدَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

targetTranslation: a single blast (subject of the sentence)
ayahArabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وٰحِدَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

ayahArabic: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وٰحِدَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Then when the Horn is blown with one blast

ayahArabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وٰحِدَةً
ayahEnglish: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow [i.e., stroke] -

ayahArabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وٰحِدَةً
ayahEnglish: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow [i.e., stroke] -

ayahArabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
ayahEnglish: Then on that Day, the Occurrence [i.e., Resurrection] will occur,

targetTranslation: on that day (when the sky splits)
ayahArabic: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.

ayahArabic: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

targetTranslation: throne (object of يَحْمِلُ - they will carry)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

targetTranslation: on that day (when the angels will be on its sides)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

ayahArabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمٰنِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

targetTranslation: on that day (when تُعْرَضُونَ - you will be presented)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.

targetTranslation: you (all) are being presented (on يَوْمَئِذٍ - that Day)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.

ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.

targetTranslation: a hidden thing (object of لا تخفى)
ayahArabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: That Day, you will be exhibited [for judgement]; not hidden among you is anything concealed.

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

targetTranslation: he was given (his book of deeds)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

targetTranslation: Here! Take! (with emphasis, to a group)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

targetTranslation: read! (command to a group) (subject of فَيَقُولُ - then he will say)
ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

ayahArabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!

ayahArabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

ayahArabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

ayahArabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."

targetTranslation: a pleasant life (describing the state of the person in فَهُوَ)
ayahArabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: So he will be in a pleasant life -

ayahArabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: So he will be in a pleasant life -

ayahArabic: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: In an elevated garden,

ayahArabic: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
ayahEnglish: In an elevated garden,

targetTranslation: its fruits (referring to the garden's fruits that are close/near)
ayahArabic: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

ayahArabic: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
ayahEnglish: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.

targetTranslation: eat! (all of you) (connected to وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ - and drink)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

targetTranslation: pleasantly/enjoyably (describing how to eat and drink)
ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

ayahArabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
ayahEnglish: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."

targetTranslation: whoever (receives their book in their left hand)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

targetTranslation: his written record/book (object of أُوتِىَ - was given)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

targetTranslation: was given/brought (object of كِتٰبَهُ - his book)
ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

ayahArabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتٰبِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record

targetTranslation: I know (negated by لَمْ before it)
ayahArabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: And had not known what is my account.

ayahArabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: And had not known what is my account.

ayahArabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: And had not known what is my account.

targetTranslation: she was (referring to death in يٰلَيْتَهَا)
ayahArabic: يٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
ayahEnglish: I wish it [i.e., my death] had been the decisive one.

ayahArabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: My wealth has not availed me.

ayahArabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: My wealth has not availed me.

ayahArabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطٰنِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: Gone from me is my authority."

ayahArabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطٰنِيَهْ
ayahEnglish: Gone from me is my authority."

targetTranslation: take him! (command to many people) (followed by فَغُلُّوهُ - then chain him)
ayahArabic: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
ayahEnglish: Then into Hellfire drive him.

targetTranslation: a chain (that will be described further)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahEnglish: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahEnglish: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

targetTranslation: seventy (length of the chain in the ayah)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahEnglish: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

targetTranslation: a cubit (unit being counted by سَبْعُونَ/seventy)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
ayahEnglish: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."

targetTranslation: he was/existed (describing the subject of يُؤْمِنُ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allāh, the Most Great,

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allāh, the Most Great,

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
ayahEnglish: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

ayahArabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
ayahEnglish: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

ayahArabic: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
ayahEnglish: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend

ayahArabic: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;

ayahArabic: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;

ayahArabic: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخٰطِـُٔونَ
ayahEnglish: None will eat it except the sinners.

targetTranslation: I swear (in response to ما تُبْصِرُونَ - what you see)
ayahArabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So I swear by what you see

ayahArabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: So I swear by what you see

ayahArabic: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And what you do not see

targetTranslation: a messenger (describing قَوْلُ/speech in this ayah)
ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the word of a noble Messenger.

ayahArabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: [That] indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is the word of a noble Messenger.

ayahArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

targetTranslation: a poet (in the phrase 'speech of a poet')
ayahArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

ayahArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

ayahArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

ayahArabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

ayahArabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

targetTranslation: a little (describing how much something happens)
ayahArabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

ayahArabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

ayahArabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.

targetTranslation: a sending down (subject of مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ)
ayahArabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: of the supreme nurturer (connected to العٰلَمِينَ)
ayahArabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
ayahEnglish: And if he [i.e., Muḥammad] had made up about Us some [false] sayings,

targetTranslation: a part/some (object of تَقَوَّلَ - falsely attributed)
ayahArabic: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
ayahEnglish: And if he [i.e., Muḥammad] had made up about Us some [false] sayings,

ayahArabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حٰجِزِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.

ayahArabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حٰجِزِينَ
ayahEnglish: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.

ayahArabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.

ayahArabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
ayahEnglish: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
